reviews.review_description:
I sat on the boat and let myself go. Sometimes to make it more real I would take a broom and use it as if I would be rowing. I love the sounds, the views, everything. It's a pity it only last around 2 minutes or so. I would add a few minutes more, may be a possibility to give direction to the boat with a control as a rowing tool.
Thank you to the developers. Please keep the good work. And make it 7 or 10 minutes. Pleeeeeaseeee♥️♥️♥️

It's a nice ride. It was very relaxing at first. Then it felt too slow. Wish I could control The pace. The music is too loud but it is a nice selection. Overall it was beautiful and what I needed in the moment...a get away.

The waterfalls are great!  I wish there was a way to turn off the music that is playing.  It is too loud so it makes it very hard to hear the waterfalls.  I'd love to just listen to the water, waterfalls, and environment sounds to relax.  It would be great if you added some fish in the water too.  :)
This is so wonderfully relaxing, so happy I found this. Wish there were more VR apps like this.
This is the second game I call it the sequel to Relax River but this time containing waterfalls. I love it a well deserved five stars Thank you to the developers
realistic simulation of a small boat crossing a river in the midst of a natural setting with waterfalls and mountains
The water falls looked so fake took me right out of the mood.
